107]  l /K:/Prüffeld
ls: /K:/Prüffeld: No such file or directory               *******************
108]

KDE File Manager runs in an endless loop.

Other unixoide OSs have _not_ this problem.

Fix: 

mount_smbfs -E cs1:cs2
does _not_ remove the problem.
How-To-Repeat: Command:
l /K:/Prüffeld
